name: Texture
summary: Represents a texture that is mapped on objects.
remarks: After the get or the set method complete, you own the copy you received or passed in, and can Dispose() of it.

methods.name: ConstructConstObject
methods.signature: protected void ConstructConstObject(Object parentObject, int subobjectIndex)
methods.summary: Assigns a parent object and a sub-object index to this.

methods.name: Dispose()
methods.summary: Actively reclaims unmanaged resources that this instance uses.

methods.name: Dispose(Boolean)
methods.summary: For derived class implementers. This method is called with argument true when class user calls Dispose(), while with argument false when the Garbage Collector invokes the finalizer, or Finalize() method.You must reclaim all used unmanaged resources in both cases, and can use this chance to call Dispose on disposable fields if the argument is true.Also, you must call the base virtual method within your overriding method.

params.name: disposing
params.doc: true if the call comes from the Dispose() method; false if it comes from the Garbage Collector finalizer.

methods.name: EnsurePrivateCopy
methods.summary: If you want to keep a copy of this class around by holding onto it in a variable after a command completes, call EnsurePrivateCopy to make sure that this class is not tied to the document. You can call this function as many times as you want.

methods.name: Finalize
methods.summary: Passively reclaims unmanaged resources when the class user did not explicitly call Dispose().

methods.name: GetAlphaBlendValues
methods.signature: public void GetAlphaBlendValues(out double constant, out double a0, out double a1, out double a2, out double a3)
methods.summary: If the TextureCombineMode is Blend, then the blending function for alpha is determined by new alpha = constant + a0*(current alpha) + a1*(texture alpha) + a2*min(current alpha,texture alpha) + a3*max(current alpha,texture alpha)

methods.name: GetObjectData
methods.signature: public virtual void GetObjectData(SerializationInfo info, StreamingContext context)
methods.summary: Populates a System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo with the data needed to serialize the target object.

methods.name: IsValidWithLog
methods.summary: Determines if an object is valid. Also provides a report on errors if this object happens not to be valid.

params.name: log
params.doc: A textual log. This out parameter is assigned during this call.

returns.doc: true if this object is valid; false otherwise.

methods.name: NonConstOperation
methods.summary: For derived classes implementers. Defines the necessary implementation to free the instance from being constant.

methods.name: OnSwitchToNonConst
methods.summary: Is called when a non-constant operation first occurs.

methods.name: SetAlphaBlendValues
methods.signature: public void SetAlphaBlendValues(double constant, double a0, double a1, double a2, double a3)
methods.summary: If the TextureCombineMode is Blend, then the blending function for alpha is determined by new alpha = constant + a0*(current alpha) + a1*(texture alpha) + a2*min(current alpha,texture alpha) + a3*max(current alpha,texture alpha)

methods.name: SetRGBBlendValues
methods.signature: public void SetRGBBlendValues(Color color, double a0, double a1, double a2, double a3)
methods.summary: If the TextureCombineMode is Blend, then the blending function for RGB is determined by new rgb = colorcolor + a0[0]*(current RGB) + a1[1]*(texture RGB) + a2[2]*min(current RGB,texture RGB) + a3[3]*max(current RGB,texture RGB)

methods.name: ToJSON
methods.summary: Create a JSON string representation of this object

properties.name: ApplyUvwTransform
properties.summary: If true then the UVW transform is applied to the texture otherwise the UVW transform is ignored.

properties.name: Disposed
properties.summary: Indicates if this object has been disposed or the document it originally belonged to has been disposed.

properties.name: Enabled
properties.summary: If the texture is enabled then it will be visible in the rendered display otherwise it will not.

properties.name: FileName
properties.summary: Gets or sets a file name that is used by this texture. NOTE: We are moving away from string-based FileName, and suggest the usage of the new FileReference class.Also, this filename may well not be a path that makes sense on a user's computer because it was a path initially set on a different user's computer. If you want to get a workable path for this user, use the BitmapTable.Find function using this property.

properties.name: FileReference
properties.summary: Gets or sets a copy of the file reference that is used by this texture. RemarksAfter the get or the set method complete, you own the copy you received or passed in, and can Dispose() of it.
properties.remarks: After the get or the set method complete, you own the copy you received or passed in, and can Dispose() of it.

properties.name: HasUserData
properties.summary: Gets true if this class has any custom information attached to it through UserData.

properties.name: Id
properties.summary: Gets the globally unique identifier of this texture.

properties.name: IsDocumentControlled
properties.summary: If true this object may not be modified. Any properties or functions that attempt to modify this object when it is set to "IsReadOnly" will throw a NotSupportedException.

properties.name: IsValid
properties.summary: Tests an object to see if it is valid.

properties.name: MagFilter
properties.summary: The MagFilter setting controls how the color of the image pixel is calculated when the image pixel corresponds to a fraction of a texture bitmap pixel.

properties.name: MinFilter
properties.summary: The MinFilter setting controls how the color of the image pixel is calculated when the image pixel corresponds to multiple texture bitmap pixels.

properties.name: Offset
properties.summary: Helper for access to the offset value encoded in UvwTransform

properties.name: ProjectionMode
properties.summary: How texture is projected onto geometry

properties.name: Repeat
properties.summary: Helper for access to the repeat value encoded in UvwTransform

properties.name: Rotation
properties.summary: Helper for access to the rotation value encoded in UvwTransform

properties.name: TextureCombineMode
properties.summary: Determines how this texture is combined with others in a material's texture list.

properties.name: TextureType
properties.summary: Controls how the pixels in the bitmap are interpreted

properties.name: TreatAsLinear
properties.summary: If false, the texture color values should be correctly by the linear workflow pre-process gamma value (in the document) if linear workflow is on. Otherwise, if the values is true, the values should be used raw from the texture.

properties.name: UserData
properties.summary: List of custom information that is attached to this class.

properties.name: UserDictionary
properties.summary: Dictionary of custom information attached to this class. The dictionary is actually user data provided as an easy to use shareable set of information.

properties.name: UvwTransform
properties.summary: Transform to be applied to each instance of this texture if ApplyUvw is true

properties.name: WcsBoxProjected
properties.summary: Is true if this texture uses world coordinate system (WCS) box projection for texture mapping. Notice: If this texture is used by an object that has an object coordinate system (OCS) frame defined on a mapping channel then that OCS frame is used instead of the WCS.

properties.name: WcsProjected
properties.summary: Is true if this texture uses world coordinate system (WCS) projection for texture mapping. Notice: If this texture is used by an object that has an object coordinate system (OCS) frame defined on a mapping channel then that OCS frame is used instead of the WCS.

properties.name: WrapU
properties.summary: Texture wrapping mode in the U direction

properties.name: WrapV
properties.summary: Texture wrapping mode in the V direction

properties.name: WrapW
properties.summary: Texture wrapping mode in the W direction
